name: Autoimmune flare-ups
msg: The body attacking itself mirrors a pattern of self-directed criticism and suppressed worthiness. The Tank is depleted — what you're carrying is turning inward.

name: Chronic inflammation
msg: Persistent inflammation is the body under constant pressure. The Squeeze keeps the inflammatory response perpetually activated.

name: Rheumatoid arthritis
msg: Joints that attack themselves. This pattern connects to accumulated emotional load — what you've carried for others at the expense of what you've held for yourself.

name: Lupus
msg: The immune system unable to distinguish self from other reflects a deep identity pattern — a self defined so long in relation to others that it no longer recognizes its own boundaries.

name: Fibromyalgia
msg: Widespread pain with no clear origin often accompanies years of emotional performance — smiling, managing, and showing up for everyone while the internal cost accumulates silently.

name: Chronic fatigue syndrome
msg: Profound exhaustion that rest doesn't fix is the body's signal that the Tank is empty. You've been pouring out without replenishment for a very long time.

name: Psoriasis
msg: The skin — our first boundary — reacts to sustained pressure. Psoriasis often flares in periods of high external demand when the internal sense of safety collapses.

name: Eczema
msg: Skin that reacts to irritants mirrors a nervous system perpetually performing and watching for rejection. The surface becomes the site of emotional labor.

name: Multiple sclerosis
msg: Myelin — the protective sheath — being eroded connects to patterns of self-protection worn thin over years of carrying too much for too long.

name: Inflammatory bowel disease
msg: The gut under siege. IBD frequently flares under sustained pressure, especially when there is no safe outlet for what the person is absorbing from their environment.

name: Hashimoto's thyroiditis
msg: The thyroid — the regulator of how much you give and how fast you go — being attacked by your own immune system. The body is questioning its own pace and output.

name: Celiac disease
msg: The body unable to tolerate a substance that seems normal to others. The Pairing — recognizing what wounds you in what others absorb without issue — is the pattern.

name: Graves' disease
msg: Overactive thyroid — producing more than is sustainable. The Audition pattern: performing at maximum output, accelerating to maintain approval and avoid perceived failure.

name: Allergies
msg: Hypersensitive immune response to ordinary stimuli reflects a nervous system in chronic Squeeze — threat-detecting even where others sense none.

name: Food sensitivities
msg: What nourishes others depletes you. The Pairing recognizes this pattern: you absorb the same substances differently because your system has been conditioned to heightened response.

name: Frequent infections
msg: When the Tank is depleted, immunity lowers. The body's defense system can only operate at the level of resources available — and yours may be chronically overdrawn.

name: Slow wound healing
msg: The body allocates healing resources last when in survival mode. Chronic stress diverts repair capacity. The Tank pattern: nothing left for self-restoration.

name: Swollen lymph nodes
msg: The lymphatic system in activation. Sustained Squeeze keeps the system in perpetual high-alert, unable to clear and reset.

name: Chronic sinusitis
msg: The nasal passages in ongoing inflammation. Often connected to emotional patterns of filtering what is allowed in and out of your life.

name: Mast cell activation
msg: A system that cannot distinguish real threat from perceived threat. The Squeeze trains the body into perpetual defensive posture — responding to everything as an emergency.

name: IBS (Irritable Bowel Syndrome)
msg: The gut is the second brain. IBS is the body's literal Squeeze response — contracting, cramping, and reacting to what cannot be processed or released.

name: Acid reflux / GERD
msg: What rises when you lie down. GERD frequently accompanies patterns of swallowing emotions — performing calm while acid builds below the surface.

name: Bloating
msg: The gut unable to move efficiently. What is held — emotionally and physically — accumulates. The Tank pattern: everything stays in, nothing releases cleanly.

name: Constipation
msg: The body holding on. Constipation patterns mirror emotional holding — difficulty releasing control, vulnerability, or experiences never fully processed.

name: Diarrhea / urgency
msg: The body expelling under pressure. The Squeeze produces urgency — an uncontrolled release mirroring the experience of chronic overwhelm breaking through containment.

name: Nausea
msg: The stomach's rejection response. Chronic nausea often accompanies sustained emotional performance — the body's signal that something it's being asked to digest doesn't sit right.

name: Loss of appetite
msg: The Tank depleted past the point of hunger. When survival resources are consumed managing emotional load, the body's appetite signals often go offline.

name: Emotional eating
msg: Using food to perform comfort for yourself. The Audition pattern: meeting your own unmet need through a substitute that doesn't require you to be seen or received.

name: Gastritis
msg: The stomach lining under siege. Gastritis is the Squeeze made visceral — sustained pressure breaking down the body's own protective barriers from the inside out.

name: Leaky gut syndrome
msg: Boundaries that no longer hold. The gut lining — like a personal boundary — has been worn thin. The Pairing pattern: absorbing what others repel because your boundaries were never reinforced.

name: High blood pressure
msg: Sustained pressure in the vascular system. The Squeeze — the state of constant external demand — is measured directly in millimeters of mercury. The body keeps score precisely.

name: Heart palpitations
msg: The heart performing irregularly. Palpitations often accompany performance anxiety — the Audition pattern activating the body's alert system before an audience, real or imagined.

name: Chest tightness
msg: The chest — the seat of vulnerability — constricting under pressure. This is the Squeeze embodied: the body protecting the heart by armoring what surrounds it.

name: Arrhythmia
msg: A heart rhythm disrupted by what's been accumulated. The Tank overload interferes with the body's most fundamental rhythm.

name: Poor circulation
msg: Resources not reaching the periphery. When the Tank is depleted, the body prioritizes core survival — extremities, creativity, and future-orientation lose their supply first.

name: Raynaud's phenomenon
msg: The body withdrawing blood from its extremities in response to perceived threat. The Pairing pattern: hyperresponsive to environmental signals others barely register.

name: Varicose veins
msg: Blood pooling — not returning efficiently. Carrying the accumulated weight of what hasn't circulated back. The Tank pattern: what goes out doesn't come back replenished.

name: Frequent headaches
msg: The head under pressure. Chronic headaches are among the body's clearest Squeeze signals — the system at capacity, blood vessels responding to sustained cortisol load.

name: Chronic anxiety
msg: The nervous system in perpetual performance mode. Chronic anxiety is the Audition that never ends — the body preparing for an audience that may never arrive, or one that's always there.

name: Panic attacks
msg: The Squeeze reaching a breaking point. A panic attack is the body's emergency broadcast — accumulated pressure finding a sudden, undeniable exit.

name: Depression
msg: The Tank emptied past the point of motivation. Depression often follows years of depletion — a system that simply no longer has the resources to generate forward momentum.

name: Brain fog
msg: Cognitive resources redirected to survival. When the Tank is depleted, the brain's higher functions — clarity, creativity, decision-making — lose their fuel first.

name: Dizziness / vertigo
msg: The world off-balance. Vertigo and dizziness often accompany periods when the Squeeze has disoriented the body's sense of stable ground — literally and figuratively.

name: Tinnitus (ringing in ears)
msg: A signal that won't stop. Tinnitus can accompany sustained nervous system activation — the body creating its own noise when external pressure has been internalized for too long.

name: Tremors / shaking
msg: The body vibrating with what it cannot express. Tremors often accompany sustained emotional suppression — the Audition pattern holding still while the nervous system oscillates.

name: Numbness / tingling
msg: Sensation shutting down. The Tank pattern extended: when the load exceeds capacity, the nervous system begins to go quiet — disconnecting from what it can no longer afford to feel.

name: Hypervigilance
msg: The nervous system trained to detect threat before it arrives. The Pairing: your system learned early that danger wears a familiar face, and it has not stopped scanning since.

name: Dissociation
msg: Leaving the body to survive it. Dissociation is the nervous system's most complete protective strategy — the Tank so overloaded that consciousness retreats to protect the person inside.

name: Thyroid dysfunction
msg: The thyroid governs pace and output. Dysfunction mirrors the body's attempt to regulate a system asked to produce more than is sustainable.

name: Adrenal fatigue
msg: The adrenal glands — the Squeeze organs — depleted from sustained cortisol production. The body burned through its stress reserves and is now running on reserves of reserves.

name: Cortisol dysregulation
msg: The stress hormone system miscalibrated. When the Squeeze is chronic, cortisol rhythms flatten — too high when rest is needed, too low when activation is required.

name: Blood sugar instability
msg: Energy that spikes and crashes mirrors the Audition cycle — performing intensely, then collapsing when the performance ends. The body learns to regulate around the emotional rhythm.

name: Unexplained weight gain
msg: The body in conservation mode. Chronic stress signals scarcity — the body stores what it has because the Tank pattern has taught it that replenishment cannot be assumed.

name: Difficulty losing weight
msg: Cortisol-driven fat storage. Under sustained Squeeze, the body prioritizes survival over metabolism — holding reserves against a threat it believes is ongoing.

name: Metabolic syndrome
msg: Multiple systems under pressure simultaneously. Metabolic syndrome is the Squeeze made systemic — when no single system can compensate, the whole pattern becomes visible.

name: Hormonal imbalances
msg: Hormones that shift based on what's being performed for others. The Audition pattern disrupts the body's natural hormonal rhythm as it adapts to sustained emotional output.

name: PCOS (polycystic ovary syndrome)
msg: Hormonal dysregulation connected to the body's response to sustained depletion. The Tank overloaded disrupts the delicate hormonal systems that require safety and sufficiency to regulate.

name: Diabetes / insulin resistance
msg: The body unable to process what it's receiving efficiently. Insulin resistance mirrors the Squeeze — cells that have stopped responding normally to normal signals after too long under duress.

name: Chronic back pain
msg: The back carries what we refuse to put down. Chronic lower back pain is the Tank made physical — the body bearing the weight of everything accumulated and never released.

name: Neck and shoulder tension
msg: The muscles of performance — holding the head high, shoulders back. Chronic tension here accompanies the Audition: the constant preparation of the body to be seen and evaluated.

name: Jaw clenching / TMJ
msg: The jaw holds what cannot be said. Clenching is the Squeeze localized — pressure accumulated in the face, in the words that were swallowed, in the responses that were suppressed.

name: Joint pain
msg: The joints — the places of connection and movement — in pain. The Tank pattern: the load you've been carrying has begun to wear on the structures meant to keep you flexible and forward-moving.

name: Muscle tension / tightness
msg: The body braced. Chronic muscle tension is the Squeeze embodied — the system prepared for impact, held in readiness for a blow that never fully lands or never stops coming.

name: Chronic pain syndrome
msg: Pain that has become the baseline. The Tank depleted past the point of acute signaling — the body has normalized the emergency.

name: Sciatica
msg: The longest nerve in the body under pressure. Sciatica carries the Tank pattern — the weight of long-held burdens pressing on the pathways meant to move you forward.

name: Osteoporosis
msg: Bones losing density. Structure not being replenished. The Tank: when resources are diverted to managing the chronic load, rebuilding core structure is deferred indefinitely.

name: Carpal tunnel syndrome
msg: The hands — the instruments of doing and giving — in pain. Carpal tunnel often accompanies the Audition: performing service, output, and care for others until the doing itself becomes unsustainable.

name: Plantar fasciitis
msg: The foundation of your movement in pain. The Tank: what you're standing on — your sense of support, ground, and capacity to keep going — has been bearing more than it was built to hold.

name: Hair loss / alopecia
msg: The body shedding under pressure. Hair loss during sustained stress is one of the body's most visible Squeeze responses — resources redirected, non-essential systems downregulated.

name: Hives / urticaria
msg: The skin reacting to something in the environment. The Pairing pattern: your system flags as threat what others absorb without response. Something familiar is triggering an outsized alarm.

name: Rosacea
msg: The face flushing — the visible surface of the Audition. Rosacea often accompanies performance-based anxiety: the skin broadcasting the internal state that the performance is designed to conceal.

name: Acne / skin breakouts
msg: The skin attempting to release what the body is carrying. Stress-driven acne is the Squeeze finding expression at the surface — pressure seeking an outlet.

name: Premature aging
msg: The body aging faster than its years. The Tank depleted chronically accelerates cellular aging — the biological cost of carrying too much for too long is written on the face and skin.

name: Excessive sweating
msg: The body releasing heat from performance. Hyperhidrosis often accompanies the Audition pattern — the physical response to sustained social evaluation, real or anticipated.

name: Brittle nails
msg: Structure failing at the edges. Brittle nails reflect nutritional and stress depletion — the Tank: what is needed for maintenance and repair is being diverted elsewhere.

name: Skin picking / scratching
msg: The hands working on the surface of the self. Skin picking connects to the Audition — a form of self-editing, finding and eliminating perceived imperfection.

name: Burnout
msg: The Tank empty. Burnout is not a character flaw — it is the predictable outcome of the Tank pattern run to its conclusion: pouring out indefinitely without a source of replenishment.

name: Emotional numbness
msg: The system shutting down to survive. Emotional numbness is what happens when the Tank has been empty long enough that feeling itself becomes a resource the body conserves.

name: Rage / anger outbursts
msg: The Squeeze reaching its limit. Rage is not the problem — it is the Squeeze breaking its own container. The pattern was always there. The outburst is just when it became visible.

name: Persistent sadness
msg: Grief that doesn't move. Persistent sadness accompanies the Tank when what was lost — identity, worth, relationships, self — was never fully acknowledged or mourned.

name: Shame spirals
msg: The Audition internalized. Shame spirals are what happens when the performance fails — the system built on performing for love concludes the self is the problem, not the pattern.

name: Perfectionism
msg: The Audition in its most refined form. Perfectionism is performance-based worth operating at full capacity — the belief that flawless execution is what makes you safe to love.

name: People-pleasing
msg: Performing for approval as a survival strategy. People-pleasing is the Audition codified — the system learned so early and so deeply that it now feels like personality rather than pattern.

name: Difficulty saying no
msg: The Audition with no exit. Inability to decline is the performance pattern protecting itself — 'no' feels like the end of approval, and approval still feels like the end of safety.

name: Fear of abandonment
msg: The Pairing pattern at its deepest: a wound that knows what abandonment feels like and has built its entire relational strategy around never experiencing it again.

name: Codependency
msg: Wounds recognizing wounds. The Pairing: being drawn to those whose patterns mirror your own early experiences, recreating the familiar territory of your original wound.

name: Intrusive thoughts
msg: The mind unable to release what the Squeeze is holding. Intrusive thoughts are the nervous system's attempt to process what has not been given a safe container for resolution.

name: Imposter syndrome
msg: The Audition doubting its own performance. Imposter syndrome is what happens when achievement is the metric for worth — no accomplishment ever feels like enough because the measuring never stops.

name: Insomnia
msg: The body unable to release the Squeeze at night. Insomnia is the system that cannot downregulate — cortisol still elevated, the threat still present, the performance still running.

name: Waking at 3am
msg: The cortisol spike between 2-4am that interrupts sleep is a Squeeze signature. The body activating stress hormones in the hours before dawn — a pattern, not an accident.

name: Sleeping too much
msg: The Tank seeking to refill through the only mechanism available — shutdown. When depletion is deep enough, the body takes what restoration it can in the only window it controls.

name: Unrefreshing sleep
msg: Sleeping without recovering. The Tank pattern: sleep that cannot restore because the ongoing depletion — emotional, physiological, relational — continues even during rest.

name: Afternoon energy crashes
msg: The performance cycle collapsing mid-afternoon. Cortisol that peaked for the morning's demands drops sharply — the Audition has a biological cost that arrives at 2pm.

name: Constant tiredness
msg: The baseline set at depletion. When the Tank has been empty long enough, exhaustion becomes the normal against which all other states are measured.

name: Difficulty waking up
synonyms: hard to get out of bed
msg: The body resistant to returning to the performance. Difficulty waking is the Tank's final resistance — the moment before the pattern resumes, the body holds on to the only rest it gets.

name: Low motivation / apathy
msg: The dopamine system depleted by chronic stress and depleted worth. Apathy is not laziness — it is the Tank empty past the point of generating desire for what comes next.

name: Irregular menstrual cycles
msg: The body downregulating reproductive function under threat. The Squeeze signals that this is not a safe environment for vulnerability — cycles become the visible marker of that assessment.

name: Fertility challenges
msg: The body holding its most resource-intensive function in reserve when the Tank is depleted. Fertility requires surplus — physiological, emotional, psychological — that chronic depletion prevents.

name: PMS / PMDD
msg: The premenstrual window when the performance becomes hardest to maintain. PMDD amplifies what is suppressed throughout the cycle — the Audition's mask slips in the luteal phase.

name: Sexual dysfunction
msg: Intimacy requires presence — and presence requires a self that is available. When the Tank is empty and the body is in survival mode, vulnerability and desire are the first capacities offline.

name: Lipedema
msg: A body storing more than diet or exercise can explain reflects a system in prolonged accumulation mode. The Tank pattern: tissue holding what hasn't had anywhere else to go, often for years before it's ever named.

name: Lymphedema
msg: Fluid that accumulates because it isn't draining and circulating back mirrors the Tank pattern precisely — what goes in doesn't return replenished, and the body has nowhere left to send the excess.

name: Hypochondria (health anxiety)
msg: A nervous system that scans the body the way it once had to scan a room for danger. The Pairing pattern: vigilance that once protected you from an external threat now points inward, toward your own body as the site of possible harm.

name: Osteoarthritis
msg: Joints worn down by cumulative load rather than a single injury. The Squeeze made physical — years of sustained pressure showing up exactly where the body has had to compensate the longest.

name: Psoriatic arthritis
msg: When the skin's inflammatory pattern moves inward to the joints, the Squeeze has stopped staying at the surface. What began as a boundary response now reaches structure — pressure accumulating deeper than before.

name: Ankylosing spondylitis
msg: The spine gradually fusing under sustained inflammatory load. The Tank pattern taken to its structural extreme — the body building rigidity around what it has had to carry for far too long without relief.

name: Gout
msg: A sudden, sharp flare after a slow accumulation no one noticed building. Gout mirrors the Squeeze precisely — pressure that gathers quietly until it reaches an undeniable breaking point in a single joint.

name: Sjögren's syndrome
msg: Glands that stop producing what they once did freely. Sjögren's mirrors the Tank at its most literal — a body that has been asked to secrete, comfort, and moisten for so long that the wells have run dry.

name: Scleroderma (systemic sclerosis)
msg: Tissue thickening and hardening where softness used to be. Scleroderma reflects a Tank pattern carried so long that the body begins reinforcing itself against a load it no longer expects to end.

name: Polymyalgia rheumatica
msg: Stiffness and aching settling into the shoulders and hips — the places we brace and carry from. The Tank pattern in a body that has spent years holding steady for others.

name: Stress fractures / weak bones
msg: Structure giving way under repeated load rather than a single trauma. The Tank pattern at the skeletal level: the body has been asked to bear weight for longer than its reserves were built to sustain.

name: Chronic masking / concealing your authentic self
msg: Presenting a version of yourself curated for approval, safety, or acceptance — while the self underneath goes unseen. The Audition pattern: performing an identity built for other people's comfort, at the cost of the one that's actually yours.

name: Rejection sensitivity / fear of being seen as different
msg: A nervous system braced for the moment your difference gets noticed and punished. The Pairing pattern: vigilance shaped by real experiences of being met with correction instead of curiosity.

name: Feeling chronically misunderstood or unseen
msg: Carrying an identity that the people around you have never fully recognized. The Tank pattern: the exhausting, invisible labor of being present in a world that keeps responding to someone you're not.

name: Exhaustion from not being given grace for who you actually are
synonyms: expected to be someone I'm not
msg: The particular exhaustion of having to earn basic understanding instead of receiving it — managing how you're perceived because who you actually are hasn't been met with room to simply exist. The Audition pattern, worn by identity itself rather than behavior alone.

name: Female pattern hair loss / postpartum hair loss
synonyms: hair loss after having a baby
msg: Hair loss shows up differently for women — often after giving everything to a pregnancy, a postpartum year, or a hormonal shift no one prepared you for. The Tank pattern: the body prioritizing survival and depleting the non-essential first, and hair is rarely treated as essential once the system goes into triage.
